name: Mushroom Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and mushrooms in margarine until onions are translucent.
2. Remove from heat and stir in parsley, egg yolks, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, and salt.
3. Trim crusts from bread slices and cut into 4 equal squares.
4. Flatten each square with a rolling pin.
5. Dip bread pieces in melted butter.
6. Arrange the bread in a mini muffin tin.
7. Fill each muffin cup with mushroom-cheese mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
